entities.name: OMICS
entities.description: A collective, broad discipline referring to the analysis of interactions of biological information obtained from profiling various -omes

entities.name: GENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material of an organism

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME
entities.description: The sum total of all the messenger RNA molecules expressed from the genes of an organism

entities.name: PROTEOME
entities.description: The entire set of proteins expressed by a genome, cell, tissue, or organism

entities.name: METABOLOME
entities.description: The complete set of small-molecule chemicals found within a biological sample

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTS
entities.description: RNA molecules produced by the process of transcription

entities.name: PROTEINS
entities.description: Gene products consisting of amino acid chains

entities.name: METABOLITES
entities.description: Small molecule gene products resulting from metabolism

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Complex networks of biological components whose qualitative and quantitative dynamics are analyzed

entities.name: CROP RESEARCH
entities.description: The application of scientific techniques to improve agricultural crops
